---
title: "IVS"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Packages

```{r}
install.packages("arrow") 
library(arrow) 
library(readr) 
install.packages("dplyr") 
library(dplyr) 
install.packages("ggplot2")
library(ggplot2)
```

## Dataset

```{r}
ivs <- read_parquet("C:/Users/alyss/Desktop/Brasil/Analysis/dados_current - 2026-06-09/Dados/resultados/contextual/ivs_municipios_sp_2010.parquet")
```

### Cleaning

```{r}
ivs_clean <- ivs |>
  filter(label_sit_dom == "Total Situação de Domicílio")


```
